items.headline: Tom's first call outscored the entire team
items.detail: Tom scored 7.5 on his first ever DC call - higher than Anthony (5.96 avg), Rye (5.17), and Bailey (3.37). His dentist metaphor for son buy-in got added to the gold standard library. One habit away from 8.5+. The guy who hasn't officially started yet is already the best closer on the roster.

items.headline: Rye needs the conversation before Tom starts Monday
items.detail: Rye's trending down - 0 closes from 3 calls, E score 1.67, prediction mismatch on Jo Kelly still unresolved. Tom starting Monday changes the dynamic. If Rye shifts to coaching-only with Tom as his first project, it reframes Rye's role from 'underperforming closer' to 'sales leader building the team'. The Bali conversation about deferring honours has natural timing here.

items.headline: MRR dropped $10K but the math still works
items.detail: MRR at $41.4K (was ~$52K on Mar 22). 60 collecting vs 67 six days ago. But CPBC is $26.94 - well under the $35 warning line - and LTV:CAC is still 75.8x. The 7 families lost weren't revenue - they were zombie subs finally cleaned up. Real number, real base.

items.headline: Exit interview system = the missing retention data
items.detail: 97% of cancellations are silent. The exit interview system from Friday's WCI meeting (automated email + SMS + 5-question form + 10min call booking) could finally close that gap. With the cancellation form already live at /cancel-feedback/, this is a HubSpot workflow build - not a new product. Leo can build the workflow shell Monday.

items.headline: Connection Assessment could be the activation unlock
items.detail: The 5 archetypes (Processor, Side-by-Side, Deflector, Night Owl, Volcano) from the portal build sprint give mentors a playbook before W1 even starts. 63% of churned families never got a mentor - if Connection Assessment feeds into mentor matching, it attacks the #1 churn driver at the point of onboarding.

leo_actions: Refreshing all MC data & pushing to GitHub
Monitoring gateway health via new watchdog system
Ready to build exit interview HubSpot workflow when Harry gives the go
Prepping Tom's onboarding checklist for Monday start
